'''âv-s-z''' ('''kavasaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarterback|quarterback]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarterback|quarterback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-s-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavasaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivasaz|thivasaz]] || [[word:jivasaz|jivasaz]] || [[word:shivasaz|shivasaz]] || [[word:kivasaz|kivasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvasaz|thuthuvasaz]] || [[word:jujuvasaz|jujuvasaz]] || [[word:shushuvasaz|shushuvasaz]] || [[word:kukuvasaz|kukuvasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvasaz|thuvasaz]] || [[word:juvasaz|juvasaz]] || [[word:shuvasaz|shuvasaz]] || [[word:kuvasaz|kuvasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvasaz|thuvasaz]] || [[word:juvasaz|juvasaz]] || [[word:shuvasaz|shuvasaz]] || [[word:kuvasaz|kuvasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevasaz|thevasaz]] || [[word:jevasaz|jevasaz]] || [[word:shevasaz|shevasaz]] || [[word:kevasaz|kevasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovasaz|thothovasaz]] || [[word:jojovasaz|jojovasaz]] || [[word:shoshovasaz|shoshovasaz]] || [[word:kokovasaz|kokovasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovasaz|thovasaz]] || [[word:jovasaz|jovasaz]] || [[word:shovasaz|shovasaz]] || [[word:kovasaz|kovasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovasaz|thovasaz]] || [[word:jovasaz|jovasaz]] || [[word:shovasaz|shovasaz]] || [[word:kovasaz|kovasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvasaz|thĂŠvasaz]] || [[word:jĂŠvasaz|jĂŠvasaz]] || [[word:shĂŠvasaz|shĂŠvasaz]] || [[word:kĂŠvasaz|kĂŠvasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavasaz|thathavasaz]] || [[word:jajavasaz|jajavasaz]] || [[word:shashavasaz|shashavasaz]] || [[word:kakavasaz|kakavasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavasaz|thavasaz]] || [[word:javasaz|javasaz]] || [[word:shavasaz|shavasaz]] || [[word:kavasaz|kavasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavasaz|thavasaz]] || [[word:javasaz|javasaz]] || [[word:shavasaz|shavasaz]] || [[word:kavasaz|kavasaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavasaz|shavasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavasaz|goshavasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavasaz|gokishavasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavasaznĂŒ|shavasaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavasaznknĂŒ|goshavasaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavasaznĂŒ|gokishavasaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavasazshĂ«|shavasazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavasaznkshĂ«|goshavasaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavasazshĂ«|gokishavasazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavasazro|shavasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavasaznkro|goshavasaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavasazro|gokishavasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavasazmu|shavasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavasaznkmu|goshavasaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavasazmu|gokishavasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavasazsher|shavasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavasaznksher|goshavasaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavasazsher|gokishavasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavasazng|shavasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavasaznkng|goshavasaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavasazng|gokishavasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavasazya|shavasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavasaznkya|goshavasaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavasazya|gokishavasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavasazyam|shavasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavasaznkyam|goshavasaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavasazyam|gokishavasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavasaznĂŒshĂ«|shavasaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavasaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshavasaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavasaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishavasaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavasaznĂŒro|shavasaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavasaznknĂŒro|goshavasaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavasaznĂŒro|gokishavasaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavasaznĂŒmu|shavasaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavasaznknĂŒmu|goshavasaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavasaznĂŒmu|gokishavasaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavasazshĂ«nĂŒ|shavasazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavasaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavasaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavasazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavasazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavasazshĂ«ro|shavasazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavasaznkshĂ«ro|goshavasaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavasazshĂ«ro|gokishavasazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavasazshĂ«mu|shavasazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavasaznkshĂ«mu|goshavasaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavasazshĂ«mu|gokishavasazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavasazronĂŒ|shavasazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavasaznkronĂŒ|goshavasaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavasazronĂŒ|gokishavasazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavasazroshĂ«|shavasazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavasaznkroshĂ«|goshavasaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavasazroshĂ«|gokishavasazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavasazromu|shavasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavasaznkromu|goshavasaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavasazromu|gokishavasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavasazmunĂŒ|shavasazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavasaznkmunĂŒ|goshavasaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavasazmunĂŒ|gokishavasazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavasazmushĂ«|shavasazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavasaznkmushĂ«|goshavasaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavasazmushĂ«|gokishavasazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavasazmuro|shavasazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavasaznkmuro|goshavasaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavasazmuro|gokishavasazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
